facts.subtitle: Подготовка локального контура без изменения рабочих файлов Codex.

findings: Setup reads visually as an admission wizard with a five-step rail.
No filesystem scan, path input, file picker, config write, installer init, desktop bridge, runtime change, adapter change, or allowlist change was found.
The setup section has no inputs, selects, file inputs, data-ui-action, or live-action.
No active primary button is present on the setup surface.
Only the local UI button Закрыть remains active.
Visible setup icons are PNG images and visibleSvgIcons is zero.
All after screenshots and metrics pass the 1600x1000 fit criteria.
